summary: High‑energy 1988 Summer Tour show captured on an Ultramatrix source; fans rave about the vibe and find the recording solid.
review: Both reviewers give this performance five stars, praising the rare Seattle appearance during the End of Summer ’88 tour and describing the night as buzzing with positive energy. The ultramatrix recording is assumed to be clear enough to enjoy, though no specific technical details are mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong enthusiasm and perfect scores indicate an excellent show; the ultramatrix source is presumed decent, yielding a high overall rating despite limited technical commentary.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on sound quality; classification as Ultramatrix suggests a blend of board and audience that is generally listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Fans highlight the overall vibe and rarity of the Seattle stop, indicating a well‑received set with strong energy throughout.
